creator: andrew@tao11.riddles.org.uk
text:
patch-source_window.c was apparently added to fix a logging issue in 20141122. However, 20151120 fixes the same issue in a different way, and the now-obsolete patch file is not removed from the port, so the patch _breaks_ logging rather than fixing it.

To reproduce: with no other options configured, use /set logfile irc.log  and  /set log on  to enable logging, join a channel and talk, observe that nothing is logged except messages not directed to any window.

To fix: remove files/patch-source_window.c
